name: Donghuang

skills.name: Soul Sacrifice
skills.description: Every time a dark orb passes through an enemy, it damages and restores Health to him.

skills.name: Eclipse
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in range and summons a dark orb. Donghuang can have up to have 3 dark orbs at a time. Hitting enemies with this skill reduces its cooldown.

skills.name: Dark Impact
skills.description: Unleashes up to 3 dark orbs at the target location, increasing own Movement Speed and dealing damage to enemies in range. The 1st and 2nd dark orbs slow enemies. The 3rd dark orb stuns enemies.

skills.name: Forsaken Contract
skills.description: Suppresses an enemy hero and summons 3 dark orbslf he or the target is damaged during suppression, the other will take thesame amount of damage.

tips: Donghuang is a Easy Tank (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 48.7% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Deftness → Scepter of Reverberation → Savant's Wrath → Augur's Word → Void Staff.
Run Nightmare for stats that match Donghuang's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Eclipse → Dark Impact → Forsaken Contract → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
Donghuang excels into Allain, Cirrus, Kaizer. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.

Donghuang is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 3.4% — expect Donghuang to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: Is Donghuang good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Donghuang is Tier S+ Tank with 48.7% win rate, 0.8% pick rate, and 3.4% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Donghuang build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Deftness, Scepter of Reverberation, Savant's Wrath, Augur's Word, Void Staff, nightmare. Run Nightmare arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Donghuang?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying into Donghuang. Deny Roaming resources early and force fights before Donghuang completes core items. Donghuang struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Donghuang counter?
faqs.answer: Donghuang is strong into Allain, Cirrus, Kaizer according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Donghuang when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Roaming lane.

faqs.question: Is Donghuang good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Donghuang is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 3.4% — expect Donghuang to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: What lane should Donghuang play?
faqs.answer: Donghuang is tagged Roaming in Camp export (Support, Tank). Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Donghuang?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Nightmare arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Donghuang or Kaizer — which is better?
faqs.answer: Donghuang vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 2.7% more often globally. Choose Donghuang when you need Roaming identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Donghuang?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 3.4% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Tank.
